title: New Every Morning, Great Is His Faithfulness
summary: When everything else feels uncertain, He is the one thing you can build on.
scripture_text: They are new every morning; great is your faithfulness. I say to myself, "The Lord is my portion; therefore I will wait for him."
prayer: Lord, You are enough for me today — not the outcome I'm hoping for, not the answer I'm waiting on, but You Yourself. Teach me to wait on You with a settled heart. Amen.

title: Be Still and Know
summary: Sometimes the most faithful thing you can do is stop moving.
scripture_text: Be still, and know that I am God.
prayer: Lord, quiet the noise in my mind today. Help me to stop striving long enough to remember that You are already God over this situation, whether I strive or not. Amen.

title: Delight Yourself in the Lord
summary: This isn't a formula for getting what you want — it's a promise about who you become.
scripture_text: Delight yourself in the Lord, and he will give you the desires of your heart.
prayer: Lord, teach me to delight in You first — not as a means to get what I want, but because knowing You is the desire underneath every other desire. Shape my heart to want what You want. Amen.

title: A Sound Mind, Not a Spirit of Fear
summary: Fear feels natural, but Paul reminds Timothy it was never God's gift to give.
scripture_text: For God has not given us a spirit of fear, but of power, and of love, and of a sound mind.
prayer: Father, when fear tries to settle into my thinking, remind me that it did not come from You. Fill me instead with Your power, Your love, and a mind that is clear and steady. Amen.

title: Weeping May Stay for the Night
summary: Your night season has an expiry date — joy is already on its way.
scripture_text: Weeping may stay for the night, but rejoicing comes in the morning.
prayer: Lord, I don't always know when the morning will come, but I trust that it will. Meet me in this night season with Your presence, and remind me that this pain is not the end of my story. Amen.

title: Cast Your Anxiety, He Cares for You
summary: You weren't designed to carry your worry alone — He's already offered to hold it.
scripture_text: Cast all your anxiety on him because he cares for you.
prayer: Father, I bring You everything I've been carrying alone — the worry, the what-ifs, the pressure. Thank You that I don't have to hold it by myself. Help me to actually let it go into Your hands today. Amen.

title: His Mercies Are New Every Morning
summary: No matter how yesterday ended, God's mercy meets you fresh this morning.
scripture_text: The steadfast love of the Lord never ceases; his mercies never come to an end; they are new every morning; great is your faithfulness.
prayer: Lord, thank You that no matter how yesterday ended, today is a fresh start in You. Help me to walk into this day trusting Your mercy and Your faithfulness. In Jesus' name, Amen.
